meta.name: 4-Week Running Base
meta.subtitle: Build the habit from scratch
meta.description: Four weeks to build a running habit. Three easy sessions per week, no targets, no pressure. Just learn to enjoy it.

weeks.title: Base Building — Week 1
weeks.note: Week 1: Build your aerobic base. Every run should feel comfortable — you're conditioning your body to handle more.

sessions.det: 5km easy · 5:50–6:20/km · Conversational pace. If you can't hold a conversation, you're going too fast.
5km easy · 5:50–6:20/km · Conversational pace. If you can't hold a conversation, you're going too fast.
3km long · 6:00–6:30/km · Easy, conversational effort throughout. The longest run of your week.

weeks.title: Build Phase — Week 2
weeks.note: Week 2: Quality over quantity. The interval and tempo sessions are where fitness is made. Protect your sleep this week.

sessions.det: 5km easy · 5:50–6:20/km · Conversational pace. If you can't hold a conversation, you're going too fast.
5km tempo · 4:45–5:05/km · Comfortably hard. You can speak in short sentences only.
4km long · 6:00–6:30/km · Easy, conversational effort throughout. The longest run of your week.

weeks.title: Build Phase — Week 3
weeks.note: Week 3: Quality over quantity. The interval and tempo sessions are where fitness is made. Protect your sleep this week.

sessions.det: 5km easy · 5:50–6:20/km · Conversational pace. If you can't hold a conversation, you're going too fast.
5km tempo · 4:45–5:05/km · Comfortably hard. You can speak in short sentences only.
5km long · 6:00–6:30/km · Easy, conversational effort throughout. The longest run of your week.

weeks.title: Peak Training — Week 4
weeks.note: Week 4: Peak training week. This is hard — it's meant to be. Trust the process and execute each session.

sessions.det: 5km easy · 5:50–6:20/km · Conversational pace. If you can't hold a conversation, you're going too fast.
4km total · 400m reps at 5K race pace · Full recovery between reps. Quality over quantity.
5km long · 6:00–6:30/km · Easy, conversational effort throughout. The longest run of your week.
